name: Lancium Childress Clean Campus
sourceName: Childress County — tax abatement records (Lancium reinvestment zone, Feb 25, 2025)
note: Lancium's planned gigawatt-scale 'Childress Clean Campus.' Childress County established a Lancium reinvestment zone on Feb 25, 2025 (county records ~3,719 acres; Lancium describes ~3,000). Lancium's claim of a 1 GW ERCOT-approved interconnect is the company's own and not independently confirmed here. Coordinates are approximate (Childress community level). (Our summary; see source.)
